raw: This pass is valid at all Harvard Museums of Science & Culture for 50% off regular museum admission rates for up to 4 people. At least one member of the party must be a MA resident. This pass may not be combined with other offers. This pass is not for group, institutional, or corporate visits. HMSC Museums: Harvard Museum of Natural History Peabody Museum of Archaeology & Ethnology Harvard Museum of the Ancient Near East Collection of Historical Scientific Instruments. This is a physical pass that must be picked up at the library.
